commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts the QuickJS code-mode worker into a private `@openclaw/code-mode-runtime` workspace package while preserving the existing root `dist/agents/code-mode.worker.js` entrypoint.

PR surface: Source -8, Tests +19, Config +44, Other +23. Total +78 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a refactor rather than a bug report. The behavior to preserve is code-mode worker execution, covered by existing code-mode tests and the PR's Testbox proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer draft PR with no narrow automated repair; the next action is maintainer review and final CI rather than a ClawSweeper fix lane.

target.title: refactor(agents): extract code mode runtime package
target.body:
## Summary

- Extracts the QuickJS code-mode worker into a private `@openclaw/code-mode-runtime` workspace package.
- Keeps the shipped root `dist/agents/code-mode.worker.js` entry stable by turning `src/agents/code-mode.worker.ts` into a small wrapper.
- Adds package exports, tsconfig paths, Vitest aliases, tsdown entries, and dev watch coverage for the new package.
- Intentionally leaves root `quickjs-wasi` ownership in place until the runtime package becomes a published dependency.

## Linked context

Which issue does this close?

Closes #

Which issues, PRs, or discussions are related?

Related #

Was this requested by a maintainer or owner?

Maintainer-requested dependency extraction follow-up.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior addressed: code-mode runtime implementation now lives behind a package boundary while preserving the existing root worker entry.
- Real environment tested: delegated Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox, Node 24 runner.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/lint-suppressions.test.ts src/infra/watch-node.test.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts`; `OPENCLAW_RUN_NODE_SKIP_DTS_BUILD=1 OPENCLAW_BUILD_ALL_NO_PNPM=1 node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs`; `CI=true npm_config_confirm_modules_purge=false pnpm_config_confirm_modules_purge=false node scripts/check-changed.mjs --timed`.
- Evidence after fix: Testbox `tbx_01kswhcpc14xxvntbf9z5msa10` passed focused Vitest; Testbox `tbx_01kswgshr479zmta1m6j3ct2wj` emitted `dist/agents/code-mode.worker.js` plus `packages/code-mode-runtime/dist/{index,types,worker}.mjs`; Testbox `tbx_01kswjcwr995wfdea67g08q3d2` passed changed gate.
- Observed result after fix: code-mode tests passed, package build outputs existed, `resolveCodeModeRuntimeWorkerUrl('file:///tmp/pkg/index.mjs')` returned `/tmp/pkg/worker.mjs`, and `check:changed` completed green.
- What was not tested: a published external `@openclaw/code-mode-runtime` package install path; this PR keeps the package private and root-bundled.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: full `pnpm build` was not used because pnpm dependency reconciliation wedged in Testbox; the tsdown build proof was run through the repo wrapper with `OPENCLAW_BUILD_ALL_NO_PNPM=1` to avoid nested pnpm installs.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): code-mode worker implementation lived entirely in `src/agents/code-mode.worker.ts`.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

- `node scripts/root-dependency-ownership-audit.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --import tsx` smoke for `testing.runCodeModeWorker(...)`
- Testbox `tbx_01kswhcpc14xxvntbf9z5msa10`: focused Vitest for lint suppressions, watch-node, and code-mode tests
- Testbox `tbx_01kswgshr479zmta1m6j3ct2wj`: tsdown JS build and emitted-file checks
- Testbox `tbx_01kswjcwr995wfdea67g08q3d2`: `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --timed`
- Autoreview panel attempt: Codex + Claude requested; Claude auth failed with 401; Codex findings were fixed
- Autoreview clean rerun: Codex reported no accepted/actionable findings

What regression coverage was added or updated?

- Code-mode tests now cover the runtime package worker URL helper.
- Watch-node tests now cover `packages/code-mode-runtime/src` rebuild relevance.
- Lint suppression allowlist now scans `packages` production sources.

What failed before this fix, if known?

- Pre-PR autoreview caught an unused worker type import and missing dev watch coverage; both were fixed before this PR.

If no test was added, why not?

N/A.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No intended behavior change. The code execution runtime boundary moved, so worker behavior is covered by the existing code-mode tests.

What is the highest-risk area?

Keeping the root worker entry and package worker build outputs aligned.

How is that risk mitigated?

The root wrapper still emits `dist/agents/code-mode.worker.js`; tsdown now also emits the private package outputs; focused code-mode tests and changed gate are green.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

Maintainer review.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

CI and maintainer review. Agent transcript was not included because it needs explicit approval before adding local session logs.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

Local Codex autoreview findings were addressed and the final Codex autoreview rerun was clean.
target.author: vincentkoc
